title: RecruitsDefaultSkin
description: Replaces vanilla default skins with human recruits from villager recruits mod
body:
All of your default skin are now various recruits from Talhanation's Villager Recruits mod.
The main purpouse of this recourcepack is to make corpse mod work better with recruit's mod, recruits use default skins with the corpse mod, so i made all the default skins look like recruits.

No more out of place random alex and zuri corpses after your epic medieval battles!

![Recruit Corpses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/875b793ea3689e6d5f07dbc9e87c3f4a18861dff_0.webp)

There are some limitations, such as the corpse will not exactly match the living recruit.



You can of course use this without the recruits mod if you just want to make default skin players look like recruits for whatever reason.
